basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) has released the official Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I Notification 2026 on its official website https://www.bits-pilani.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a Master's Degree in Physics with a minimum of 60% marks (or equivalent CGPA) and GATE/NET qualification and a maximum age limit of 28 years (age relaxation applicable as per Government rules) can apply via email up to 20 July 2026. The official

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 28 years (Age relaxation as per government rules)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Physics with minimum 60% marks (or equivalent CGPA) and GATE/NET qualified.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate 1: First class Master's Degree in Physics (or equivalent) with a minimum of 60 % marks (or equivalent CGPA) from a recognized University (or equivalent) + GATE/NET qualified. Prior experience or strong interest in numerical computation and/or theoretical calculations will be an added advantage.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- per month for NET/GATE Qualified Candidates; Rs. 30,000/- per month for Non-NET/GATE Qualified Candidates.
salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000/- per month (for NET/GATE Qualified Candidates) Project Associate-I: Rs. 30,000/- per month (for Non-NET/GATE Qualified Candidates)

selection_process: Candidates will be shortlisted based on their merit
and as per the requirements of the project. Shortlisted candidates will be informed of the interview
which will be conducted through online mode. Only qualified and suitable candidates will be called for an interview.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate 1 Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 20th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-1 post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Physics with a minimum of 60% marks (or equivalent CGPA) and must be GATE/NET qualified. Candidates without GATE/NET may be considered for a lower post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates is 28 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the existing government rules and regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-1 positions?
faq.answer: For NET/GATE qualified candidates, the salary is Rs. 37,000/- per month. For non-NET/GATE qualified candidates, the salary is Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted via email. You must send your CV, cover letter with referee details, and a copy of your NET/GATE score card (if applicable) to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the subject line for the application email?
faq.answer: The subject line for the application email should be 'Application for JRF/PA- ANRF Project'.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be sent via email?
faq.answer: You need to send your CV, a cover letter with contact details of at least two academic referees, and a copy of your NET/GATE/National-level exam score card (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates will be shortlisted based on merit and experience. Shortlisted candidates will be called for an online interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
